## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction

Minimal steps or code to reproduce:


## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include the error message and stack trace if any.

```
<paste logs or exception here>
```

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. macOS 15.1, Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04)
- Python version: (`python --version`)
- `mcp-nbb` version: (`pip show mcp-nbb | grep Version`)
- MCP client: (e.g. Claude Desktop, stdio client…)

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — related issues, upstream NBB changes, etc.
